name: Zonzain
description: Hollow who fought against Karakura-Raizer.     Zonzain is a "large sized Hollow" that resembles the cross between a worm and a sunflower. His face and complete look is rather plain in comparison to most Hollows. He tends to count-down as he prepares to attack, and is highly unimpressed when he meets Kon (although he pretends to be impressed just to go along with the mood).
